title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a valid user can sign in and land on the main dashboard for their role.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify role-appropriate dashboard content is visible

title: Assign timetable cells to a teacher
description: This verifies that an operator can select timetable cells, review validation, confirm the selection, and see the assignment applied.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Select schedule cells for a teacher

title: Start a scheduling window session
description: This verifies that an operator can open an existing scheduling window and start it so the queue and schedule grid become available.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the schedule grid is displayed

title: Reject invalid credentials
description: This verifies that signing in with incorrect credentials shows an invalid credentials message and does not grant access.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible
Verify the dashboard is not displayed

title: Resolve a dashboard conflict
description: This verifies that a user can resolve a scheduling conflict from the dashboard and see the conflict list update.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Resolve a conflict from the conflict list
Verify the conflict list is updated
Verify the resolved conflict is no longer shown as pending

title: Clear schedules for a period
description: This verifies that a user can clear all schedules for a selected period and see the period become empty afterward.

steps.description: Choose the option to clear schedules for a period
Verify the selected period no longer shows scheduled entries

title: Call the next person in the queue
description: This verifies that an operator can call the next person in the queue and see the next teacher move into attention.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Call the next person in the queue
Verify the next teacher is shown as being attended

title: Generate schedules from the dashboard
description: This verifies that schedule generation can be started from the dashboard and the updated scheduling state is reflected afterward.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify generated schedules are reflected on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows updated scheduling progress

title: Review dashboard indicators and conflict overview
description: This verifies that an authenticated user can review the main dashboard indicators, charts, heatmap, and conflict list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify schedule coverage and conflict visualizations are displayed

title: Edit a schedule assignment
description: This verifies that a user can open an assignment, update it, and see the revised assignment reflected in the schedule grid.

steps.description: Open an existing schedule assignment for editing
Verify the revised assignment is displayed in the schedule view

title: Create a scheduling window
description: This verifies that an operator can create a new scheduling window and see it added to the window list.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill in a valid name for the window
Verify the new window appears in the list

title: Finish a scheduling window session
description: This verifies that an operator can finish a session and see the window return to a closed state.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the window is shown as closed

title: Delete a schedule assignment
description: This verifies that a user can remove a schedule entry and see it disappear from the schedule view after confirmation.

steps.description: Open an existing schedule assignment for deletion
Verify the assignment is removed from the schedule view

title: Review schedules by different perspectives
description: This verifies that a user can switch between schedule perspectives and see the corresponding schedule information update.

steps.description: Switch to the teacher schedule view
Switch to the room schedule view
Verify schedule information is displayed for the selected perspectives

title: Preserve availability changes after slot toggling
description: This verifies that availability changes are saved automatically when a user toggles time slots in the weekly grid.

steps.description: Select a teacher from the list
Toggle a valid availability slot on the weekly grid
Verify the selected slot appears as available for the teacher

title: Create an academic period from configuration
description: Verifies that a user can create a new academic period and see it available for use.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new academic period is available for use

title: Manage teacher availability across the weekly grid
description: This verifies that a user can select a teacher, toggle availability slots, switch turns, and see the availability grid update and persist.

steps.description: Select a teacher from the list
Toggle a valid availability slot on the weekly grid
Toggle a previously selected slot off
Verify the availability grid reflects the saved slot changes for the selected teacher

title: Mark a person as absent
description: This verifies that an operator can mark a queued person as absent and see the queue status update.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the queue status is updated

title: Create a new docente record
description: This verifies that authorized staff can create a new teacher record and see it added to the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the teacher details with valid information
Verify the new teacher appears in the list
Verify the teacher list reflects the added record

title: Create a course
description: Verifies that a user can add a new course and see it appear in the course list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new course appears in the course list

title: Edit an existing docente
description: This verifies that a docente record can be opened, updated, and shown with the new information in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing teacher for editing
Update the teacher information with valid changes
Verify the updated teacher appears in the list
Verify the teacher record reflects the changes

title: Edit a course and its groups
description: Verifies that a user can update an existing course and its group configuration and see the changes reflected.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing course for editing
Verify the updated course information is displayed
Verify the updated group configuration is displayed

title: Configure scheduling settings and save changes
description: This verifies that a user can update scheduling configuration sections and see the saved settings reflected afterward.

steps.description: Update a turn or restriction setting
Verify the updated configuration is displayed

title: Update an academic period state and dates
description: Verifies that a user can edit an academic period and see the updated state reflected.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Update the period dates or state
Verify the period reflects the updated state

title: Search and filter docentes
description: This verifies that users can search and filter the docente list and see the results update with active filters.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Apply a search term and at least one filter to the docente list
Verify the docente list is filtered
Verify active filter chips are displayed

title: Create an environment
description: Verifies that a user can add a new environment and see it appear in the environment list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new environment appears in the list

title: Assign compatible environments to a course
description: Verifies that a user can map compatible environments to a course and see the assignment applied.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open a course for environment assignment
Verify the environment mapping is displayed for the course

title: Update period and campaign configuration
description: This verifies that a user can review configured periods and campaign settings, update them, and see the changes persisted in the interface.

steps.description: Review the configured periods and campaign settings
Verify the updated period or campaign configuration is displayed

title: Open a docente schedule preview
description: This verifies that a teacher record can open a schedule preview and display the teacher's schedule view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing teacher for schedule preview
Verify the teacher schedule preview is displayed
Verify schedule entries are visible in the preview

title: Search and filter courses
description: Verifies that course search and filters narrow the list and show active filter chips.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Apply a course search and one or more filters
Verify the course list updates to match the filters
Verify active filter chips are displayed

title: Export the current schedule view
description: This verifies that a user can generate an export from the schedule screen for the currently selected view.

steps.description: Select the schedule view to export
Start the export for the current schedule view
Verify an export confirmation or generated export state is visible

title: Filter environments and review the campus map
description: Verifies that environment filters update the list and the campus map shows locations and occupancy indicators.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Apply a type, capacity, or search filter
Verify the environment list updates to match the filter
Switch to the campus map view

title: View personal schedule
description: A teacher can open their self-service schedule page and see their assigned classes displayed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the personal schedule page
Verify the personal schedule is displayed

title: View teacher schedule in self-service mode
description: This verifies that a teacher can open their schedule view and see their assigned timetable information.

steps.description: Verify the teacher's schedule information is displayed

title: Delete a docente record
description: This verifies that a docente can be deleted after confirmation and is removed from the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the teacher is removed from the list
Verify the list no longer shows the deleted record

title: Edit and delete an environment
description: Verifies that a user can update an environment and remove it from the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated environment is displayed
Verify the environment is removed from the list

title: Export teacher schedule from self-service mode
description: This verifies that a teacher can initiate an export of their personal schedule from the self-service page.

steps.description: Verify an export confirmation or generated export state is visible

title: Delete and reactivate a course
description: Verifies that a removed course disappears from the list and can be restored later.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the course is removed from the list
Verify the course returns to the list

title: Download personal schedule as PDF
description: A teacher can download their personal schedule in PDF format from the self-service page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the personal schedule page
Verify the PDF download is initiated
Verify the personal schedule remains visible

title: Download personal schedule as Excel
description: A teacher can download their personal schedule in Excel format from the self-service page.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the personal schedule page
Verify the Excel download is initiated
Verify the personal schedule remains visible

title: Keep schedule visible after exporting
description: A teacher can export their schedule and continue reviewing the same page without losing context.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the personal schedule page
Download the schedule as PDF or Excel
Verify the personal schedule is still displayed
Verify assigned classes are still displayed

title: See session connection status
description: This verifies that an operator can see the real-time connection indicator while working in a scheduling window.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the connection status indicator is visible

title: View an empty personal schedule state
description: A teacher with no assigned classes sees an empty state instead of a broken schedule view.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the personal schedule page
